description: If you're just getting into the game, the nike Marquis FG men's Soccer Cleat is equipped with the traction and support you need to make your goal. Upper PVC-free synthetic leather upper to withstand extensive weathering Off-centre lacing and traditional tongue for comfort Stitch detailing to further add to the structure Lightly padded collar for comfort Midsole EVA midsole for superior cushioning High-density, die-cut recycled EVA sockliner Outsole Lightweight TPU plate combining conical studs at the forefoot Oblong studs at the heel for use on firm natural surfaces or artificial turf shoe careRub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
